commands.name: assign-videoteam-inbox
commands.title: Assign Video Team Inbox
commands.description: Assign video team inbox threads to yourself

commands.name: video-progress
commands.title: Video Progress
commands.description: View and manage video editing progress for active tasks

commands.name: code-index
commands.title: Code Index
commands.description: Search generated code inventory for functions, routes, and API calls

commands.name: scout-prep
commands.title: Scout Prep
commands.description: Prep a live scouting call with voicemail and deficit guidance

commands.name: head-scout-schedules
commands.title: Scout Openings
commands.description: View scout open slots for the current week

commands.name: client-message-inbox
commands.title: Client Messages
commands.description: Latest messages for saved ID clients with workflow-aware actions.

commands.name: reconcile-scheduled-follow-up-tasks
commands.title: Reconcile Scheduled Follow-Ups
commands.description: Applies cached scheduled follow-up notes when Laravel creates the follow-up task.

tools.name: manual-sa-additions
tools.title: Manual Sa Additions
tools.description: AI assistant for loose-athlete search, resolve, and Video Progress materialization

tools.name: deplicate-profiles
tools.title: Deduplicate Profiles
tools.description: Find and resolve duplicate SA profiles through the Scout Prep duplicate-profile domain

tools.name: maxpreps-scout-context
tools.title: MaxPreps Scout Context
tools.description: Resolve mascot and state rank for a resolved school and sport

preferences.name: supabaseUrl
preferences.title: Supabase URL
preferences.description: Project URL used for lifecycle writes via PostgREST.

preferences.name: supabaseSecretKey
preferences.title: Supabase Secret Key
preferences.description: Preferred sb_secret key for athlete lifecycle writes.

preferences.name: supabaseServiceRoleKey
preferences.title: Supabase Service Role Key (Legacy)
preferences.description: Deprecated legacy key. Use Supabase Secret Key instead.

preferences.name: supabaseSchema
preferences.title: Supabase Schema
preferences.description: Optional schema for lifecycle tables. Defaults to public.

preferences.name: parentResponseTokenSecret
preferences.title: Parent Response Token Secret
preferences.description: Secret used to hash one-time parent response link tokens.

preferences.name: parentResponsePublicBaseUrl
preferences.title: Parent Response Public Base URL
preferences.description: Public Prospect Web URL used when creating parent response links.

preferences.name: dropboxToken
preferences.title: Dropbox API Token
preferences.description: Your Dropbox API token for file request creation

preferences.name: scoutApiKey
preferences.title: Scout API Key
preferences.description: Used for video stage/status updates (required)

preferences.name: craftBaseUrl
preferences.title: Craft MCP URL
preferences.description: MCP endpoint only (example: https://mcp.craft.do/links/<id>/mcp).

preferences.name: craftApiToken
preferences.title: Craft MCP Password
preferences.description: Optional MCP password (examples: !500243 or password:!500243). Do not use Bearer/Authorization values.

preferences.name: craftInQueueBlockId
preferences.title: Craft In Queue Block ID
preferences.description: Optional override for due-date reminders. Paste block ID or craftdocs://open?blockId=... link.

preferences.name: craftEmailFollowUpBlockId
preferences.title: Craft Email Follow Up Block ID
preferences.description: Optional override for follow-up reminders. Paste block ID or craftdocs://open?blockId=... link.

preferences.name: craftDropboxFoldersBlockId
preferences.title: Craft Dropbox Folders Block ID
preferences.description: Optional override for dropbox-folder reminders. Paste block ID or craftdocs://open?blockId=... link.

preferences.name: notionToken
preferences.title: Notion API Token
preferences.description: Internal integration token with access to the Current Call Scripts page.

preferences.name: notionCurrentCallScriptsPageId
preferences.title: Notion Current Call Scripts Page ID
preferences.description: Page ID or Notion page URL containing the Script and Voicemail toggles.

preferences.name: notionCallNotesPageId
preferences.title: Notion Call Notes Page ID
preferences.description: Optional override for the Prospect HQ Call Notes page.

preferences.name: notionScriptToggleTitle
preferences.title: Notion Script Toggle Title
preferences.description: Exact toggle title to replace with the current scout prep script.

preferences.name: notionVoicemailToggleTitle
preferences.title: Notion Voicemail Toggle Title
preferences.description: Exact toggle title to replace with the current voicemail text.

preferences.name: followUpSenderName
preferences.title: Follow-Up Sender Name
preferences.description: Used for the Call Attempt 2 text signoff when that trigger is wired.

preferences.name: calApiKey
preferences.title: Cal API Key
preferences.description: Used by Client Messages to book Cal follow-up calls.

preferences.name: calFollowUpEventTypeId
preferences.title: Cal Follow Up Event Type ID
preferences.description: Numeric Cal event type ID used for Client Messages follow-up bookings.

scripts.test:craft-reminder-date: rm -rf /tmp/craft-reminder-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --outDir /tmp/craft-reminder-tests src/lib/craft-reminder-date.ts src/lib/craft-reminder-date.test.ts && node --test /tmp/craft-reminder-tests/craft-reminder-date.test.js
scripts.test:notion-call-scripts: rm -rf /tmp/notion-call-scripts-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/notion-call-scripts-tests src/lib/notion-call-scripts.ts src/lib/notion-call-scripts.test.ts src/lib/logger.ts && mkdir -p /tmp/notion-call-scripts-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api && printf "exports.getPreferenceValues = () => ({});\n" > /tmp/notion-call-scripts-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api/index.js && NODE_PATH=/tmp/notion-call-scripts-tests/node_modules:$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/notion-call-scripts-tests/notion-call-scripts.test.js
scripts.test:prospect-search: rm -rf /tmp/prospect-search-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/prospect-search-tests src/lib/prospect-search-term.ts src/lib/prospect-search.test.ts src/lib/personal-follow-up-cache.ts src/lib/personal-follow-up-cache.test.ts && mkdir -p /tmp/prospect-search-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api && printf "exports.LocalStorage = { getItem: async () => undefined, setItem: async () => {} };\n" > /tmp/prospect-search-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api/index.js && NODE_PATH=/tmp/prospect-search-tests/node_modules:$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/prospect-search-tests/prospect-search.test.js /tmp/prospect-search-tests/personal-follow-up-cache.test.js
scripts.test:scout-prep-time: rm -rf /tmp/scout-prep-time-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/scout-prep-time-tests src/lib/scout-prep-ai.ts src/lib/scout-prep-ai.test.ts src/features/scout-prep/content.ts src/features/scout-prep/types.ts src/lib/logger.ts && NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/scout-prep-time-tests/lib/scout-prep-ai.test.js
scripts.test:scout-task-filters: rm -rf /tmp/scout-task-filter-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/scout-task-filter-tests src/lib/scout-task-filters.ts src/lib/scout-task-filters.test.ts src/features/scout-prep/types.ts src/lib/scout-prep-follow-up-index.ts && NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/scout-task-filter-tests/lib/scout-task-filters.test.js
scripts.test:scout-follow-up-templates: rm -rf /tmp/scout-follow-up-template-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/scout-follow-up-template-tests src/lib/scout-follow-up-templates.ts src/lib/scout-follow-up-templates.test.ts && NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/scout-follow-up-template-tests/lib/scout-follow-up-templates.test.js
scripts.test:cal-follow-ups: rm -rf /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests && tsc --skipLibCheck --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --outDir /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests src/lib/reminders.ts src/lib/cal-follow-ups.ts src/lib/cal-follow-ups.test.ts && mkdir -p /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests/node_modules/@raycast/utils && printf "exports.getPreferenceValues = () => ({});\n" > /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api/index.js && printf "exports.runAppleScript = async () => '';\n" > /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests/node_modules/@raycast/utils/index.js && NODE_PATH=/tmp/cal-follow-up-tests/node_modules:$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/cal-follow-up-tests/cal-follow-ups.test.js

scripts.test:head-scout-lifecycle: rm -rf /tmp/head-scout-lifecycle-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --outDir /tmp/head-scout-lifecycle-tests src/lib/head-scout-appointment-lifecycle.ts src/lib/head-scout-appointment-lifecycle.test.ts src/lib/head-scout-schedules.ts src/lib/fastapi-client.ts src/lib/api-bootstrap.ts src/lib/python-env.ts src/lib/logger.ts src/lib/scout-prep-ai.ts src/lib/scout-prep-contact.ts src/lib/scout-follow-up-templates.ts src/lib/sales-lifecycle.ts src/features/scout-prep/content.ts src/features/scout-prep/types.ts && mkdir -p /tmp/head-scout-lifecycle-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api && printf "const path = require('path');\nexports.environment = { assetsPath: path.dirname(require.resolve('sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.wasm')) };\n" > /tmp/head-scout-lifecycle-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api/index.js && NODE_PATH=/tmp/head-scout-lifecycle-tests/node_modules:$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/head-scout-lifecycle-tests/src/lib/head-scout-appointment-lifecycle.test.js
scripts.test:head-scout-schedules: rm -rf /tmp/head-scout-schedules-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --outDir /tmp/head-scout-schedules-tests src/lib/head-scout-schedules.ts src/lib/head-scout-schedules.test.ts src/lib/fastapi-client.ts src/lib/api-bootstrap.ts src/lib/python-env.ts src/lib/logger.ts src/lib/scout-prep-ai.ts src/features/scout-prep/content.ts src/features/scout-prep/types.ts && NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/head-scout-schedules-tests/src/lib/head-scout-schedules.test.js
scripts.test:supabase-lifecycle: rm -rf /tmp/supabase-lifecycle-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --outDir /tmp/supabase-lifecycle-tests src/lib/supabase-lifecycle.ts src/lib/supabase-lifecycle.test.ts src/lib/logger.ts && mkdir -p /tmp/supabase-lifecycle-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api && printf "exports.getPreferenceValues = () => ({});\n" > /tmp/supabase-lifecycle-tests/node_modules/@raycast/api/index.js && NODE_PATH=/tmp/supabase-lifecycle-tests/node_modules:$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/supabase-lifecycle-tests/src/lib/supabase-lifecycle.test.js
scripts.verify:10x-communications: tsx --test src/lib/client-message-audit-verification.test.ts src/lib/client-message-reply-themes.test.ts src/lib/client-message-evidence-receipts.test.ts src/lib/client-message-action-proposals.test.ts src/domain/pending-client-watchlist.test.ts && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck src/lib/client-message-audit-verification.ts src/lib/client-message-audit-verification.test.ts src/lib/client-message-action-proposals.ts src/lib/client-message-action-proposals.test.ts src/lib/client-message-evidence-receipts.ts src/lib/client-message-evidence-receipts.test.ts src/lib/client-message-reply-themes.ts src/lib/client-message-reply-themes.test.ts src/domain/pending-client-watchlist.ts src/domain/pending-client-watchlist.test.ts && tsc --noEmit --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck scripts/audit-10x-communications-evidence.mjs --allowJs --checkJs false && npm run audit:10x-communications-evidence && node -e "const report=require('./tmp/10x-communications-evidence-audit.json'); if (report.verificationSummary?.status !== 'pass') { console.error(JSON.stringify(report.verificationSummary, null, 2)); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.api: cd npid-api-layer && source venv/bin/activate && python -m uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
